title: Yearn - Rekt IV
relevance_summary: Configuration error leading to a flash loan exploit on an outdated contract

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS DONATETORESERVES() AFTER A FLASH LOAN BORROW IN THE SAME TX
summary: A configuration error in an outdated Yearn TUSD vault allowed attackers to use a flash loan to break share accounting and drain funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
